title: rosa moschata var. arborea
intro: Rosa moschata var. arborea, also known as the climbing musk rose, is a fragrant climbing rose species native to the Himalayas and China. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help soothe skin irritations and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Rosa moschata var. arborea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and even alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rosa moschata var. arborea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in perfumery due to its distinctive musky fragrance.
